column8: Rimsky-Korsakov came from a poor background.
column9: Balakirev asked Rimsky-Korsakov to leave the navy.
column10: Mussorgsky was more famous than Borodin.
column12: Some people criticised Rimsky-Korsakov because of his education.
column13: Rimsky-Korsakov combined folk music with classical music.
column14: Prokofiev and Stranvinsky wrote an opera together.
column15: The Conservatory was renamed more than 40 years after Rimsky-Korsakov died.
